event.summary: Accepted the unit after passing validation and instruction synchronization.

acceptance.proof: A public-safe fixture binds the pinned official documentation URL, revision, exact UTF-8 SHA-256, UDP port 16571, broadcast-and-or-multicast wording, and all seven destination spellings exactly as displayed.
The fixture classifies every fact as public-documentation specification evidence, records no black-box observation, and adds no candidate destination/address/port contract.
The displayed FF08113D spelling and presentation parentheses are preserved as source facts without address parsing, normalization, correction, or operational interpretation.

No sockets, interface enumeration, multicast joins, broadcast sends, endpoint selection, retries, clocks, currentness, reachability/interoperability claims, runtime activation, dependencies, unsafe/FFI, devices, private artifacts, or Manifold authority are added.

document.commit_policy: Commit specification evidence separately from any destination data contract, parser, socket, discovery runtime, or interoperability claim.

instruction_surfaces.change_reason: Route exact documented default destination evidence and prohibit candidate/runtime inference.
Describe only the public documentation evidence and limitations.
Review public/private routing; no shared-skill mutation required.
Review evidence roles, reference intake, and closed activation; no shared-skill mutation required.

non_scope: Address parsing, normalization, correction, classification, binary representation, destination selection, deduplication, ordering semantics, defaults API, or candidate contract.
Sockets, interface enumeration, multicast joins, broadcast sends, endpoint selection, retries, clocks, currentness, reachability, interoperability, discovery runtime, or activation.
Dependencies, features, unsafe, FFI, devices, private artifacts, implementation-source inspection, black-box observation, or Manifold authority.
document.objective: Record exact public official documentation evidence for default-settings protocol-110 UDP discovery port 16571 and the displayed multicast/broadcast destination spellings, preserving unusual source spellings and separating specification facts from observations, candidate contracts, and future runtime behavior.
outputs: Public-safe provenance-locked specification fixture with exact source hash and displayed facts.
Deterministic checker rejecting fact, classification, provenance, or limitation drift.
Public routing and validation documentation, Standard receipt, and executed no-force feature-push receipt.
